title: Method and system for throttling bandwidth based on temperature
abstract: Systems, methods, and/or devices are used to manage a storage system. In one aspect, the method includes, during a first time period: maintaining a credit pool for the first time period; limiting bandwidth used for transmitting data between a storage device of the storage system and a host operatively coupled with the storage device according to a status of the credit pool, where the storage device includes one or more memory devices; monitoring a temperature of the storage device; and, in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, reducing an initial value of the credit pool for a second time period according to a first adjustment factor corresponding to the predetermined temperature threshold, where the second time period is subsequent to the first time period.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A method of managing a storage system, the method comprising: maintaining a credit pool for the first time period; limiting bandwidth used for transmitting data between a storage device of the storage system and a host operatively coupled with the storage device in accordance with a status of the credit pool, wherein the storage device includes one or more memory devices; monitoring a temperature of the storage device; and in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a first predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, reducing an initial value of the credit pool for a second time period according to a first adjustment factor corresponding to the first predetermined temperature threshold, wherein the second time period is subsequent to the first time period. 2. The method of claim 1, further comprising: in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device is below the first predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, increasing an initial value of the credit pool for the second time period according to the first adjustment factor corresponding to the first predetermined temperature threshold, wherein the second time period is subsequent to the first time period. 3. The method of any of claims 1-2, further comprising: during the second time period: maintaining the credit pool for the second time period; limiting bandwidth used for transmitting data between the storage device and the host in accordance with the status of the credit pool; monitoring a temperature of the storage device; and in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a second predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, reducing an initial value of the credit pool for a third time period according to a second adjustment factor corresponding to the second temperature threshold, wherein the third time period is subsequent to the second 

 time period, and wherein the second adjustment factor is distinct from the first adjustment factor. 4. The method of any of claims 1-3, further comprising: during the first time period, receiving a request to perform a first memory operation on the one or more memory devices; and in accordance with a determination that at least one credit remains in the credit pool for the first time period: performing the first memory operation; and decrementing the credit pool according to the first memory operation. 5. The method of claim 4, further comprising: in accordance with a determination that there are no credits remaining in the credit pool for the first time period: forgoing performance of the first memory operation; and adding the first memory operation to a deferred memory operations queue. 6. The method of any of claims 1-5, further comprising: in accordance with a determination that the first time period has elapsed, replenishing the credit pool according to the reduced initial value for the second time period. 7. The method of any of claims 1-6, wherein the first time period and the second time period correspond to a predetermined length of time. 8. The method of any of claims 1-7, wherein an initial value for the credit pool corresponds to a predetermined number of memory operations. 9. The method of any of claims 1-8, further comprising: in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a predetermined reporting temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, sending a notification to a user according to a predefined communication method. 10. The method of any of claims 1-9, wherein the one or more memory devices comprise one or more flash memory devices. 11. A storage device, comprising: 

 means for maintaining a credit pool for the first time period; means for limiting bandwidth used for transmitting data between a storage device of the storage system and a host operatively coupled with the storage device in accordance with a status of the credit pool, wherein the storage device includes one or more memory devices; means for monitoring a temperature of the storage device; and in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a first predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, means for reducing an initial value of the credit pool for a second time period according to a first adjustment factor corresponding to the first predetermined temperature threshold, wherein the second time period is subsequent to the first time period. 12. The storage device of claim 11, further comprising means for performing the method of any of claims 2-10. 13. A storage device, comprising: non-volatile memory; a storage controller having one or more processors configured to execute instructions in one or more programs; wherein the storage controller is configured to perform operations comprising: maintaining a credit pool for the first time period; limiting bandwidth used for transmitting data between a storage device of the storage system and a host operatively coupled with the storage device in accordance with a status of the credit pool, wherein the storage device includes one or more memory devices; monitoring a temperature of the storage device; and in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a first predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, reducing an initial value of the credit pool for a second time period according to a first adjustment factor corresponding to the first predetermined temperature threshold, wherein the second time period is subsequent to the first time period. 14. The storage device of claim 13, wherein the storage controller includes: one or more credit modules to maintain the credit pool and update a value of the credit pool; 

 a bandwidth limiting module to limit the bandwidth used for transmitting data between the storage device of the storage system and the host operatively coupled with the storage device in accordance with the status of the credit pool; and a temperature monitoring module to monitor the temperature of the storage device. 15. The storage device of any of claims 13-14, wherein the storage controller is further configured to perform operations comprising: in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device is below the first predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, increasing an initial value of the credit pool for the second time period according to the first adjustment factor corresponding to the first predetermined temperature threshold, wherein the second time period is subsequent to the first time period. 16. The storage device of any of claims 13-15, the one or more programs further comprising instructions for: during the second time period: maintaining the credit pool for the second time period; limiting bandwidth used for transmitting data between the storage device and the host in accordance with the status of the credit pool; monitoring a temperature of the storage device; and in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a second predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, reducing an initial value of the credit pool for a third time period according to a second adjustment factor corresponding to the second temperature threshold, wherein the third time period is subsequent to the second time period, and wherein the second adjustment factor is distinct from the first adjustment factor. 17. The storage device of any of claims 13-16, the one or more programs further comprising instructions for: during the first time period, receiving a request to perform a first memory operation on the one or more memory devices; and in accordance with a determination that at least one credit remains in the credit pool for the first time period: 

 performing the first memory operation; and decrementing the credit pool according to the first memory operation. 18. The storage device of any of claims 13-17, the one or more programs further comprising instructions for: in accordance with a determination that there are no credits remaining in the credit pool for the first time period: forgoing performance of the first memory operation; and adding the first memory operation to a deferred memory operations queue. 19. The storage device of any of claims 13-18, the one or more programs further comprising instructions for: in accordance with a determination that the first time period has elapsed, replenishing the credit pool according to the reduced initial value for the second time period. 20. The storage device of any of claims 13-19, wherein an initial value for the credit pool corresponds to a predetermined number of memory operations. 21. The storage device of any of claims 13-20, the one or more programs further comprising instructions for: in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a predetermined reporting temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, sending a notification to a user according to a predefined communication method. 22. A storage system, comprising: a storage medium; one or more processors; and memory storing one or more programs, which when executed by the one or more processors cause the storage system to perform or control performance of the method of any of claims 1-10. 23. A non-transitory computer readable storage medium, storing one or more programs configured for execution by one or more processors of a storage device, the one or more programs including instructions for performing the method of any of claims 1-10. 24. A non-transitory computer readable-storage medium, storing one or more programs configured for execution by one or more processors of a storage device, the one or more programs including instructions for: maintaining a credit pool for the first time period; limiting bandwidth used for transmitting data between a storage device of the storage system and a host operatively coupled with the storage device in accordance with a status of the credit pool, wherein the storage device includes one or more memory devices; monitoring a temperature of the storage device; and in accordance with a determination that a current temperature of the storage device exceeds a first predetermined threshold temperature and the current temperature of the storage device satisfies one or more temperature criteria, reducing an initial value of the credit pool for a second time period according to a first adjustment factor corresponding to the first predetermined temperature threshold, wherein the second time period is subsequent to the first time period. 25. The storage medium of claim 24, wherein the one or more programs further comprise instructions that when executed by the one or more processors cause the storage device to perform the method of any of claims 2-10.
